summary: Frontend-only testing of /solutions/company-operating-infrastructure (Mentor OS). All 15 sections, content counts, hero, Growth OS scenario, DEXA, CTAs verified. All four other solution routes (healthcare, insurance, fintech, ai) load correctly. No JS errors.
critical_code_review_comments: CompanyOperatingInfrastructure.jsx is 265 lines with 15 inline section components - acceptable but could be split for maintainability if more sections are added.
ScrollReveal animations require user scroll to initialize content visibility - Playwright tests must scroll the full page before asserting counts (worth noting for next testing agents).

Hero anchor link 'Explore Growth OS' uses Link to='#growth-os' (react-router); native anchor scroll may not behave as expected since react-router treats it as a route. Consider using a regular <a href='#growth-os'> or smooth scroll handler. Minor UX issue, not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 solution dedicated pages now pass (healthcare, insurance, fintech, ai, company-operating-infrastructure). Page uses ScrollReveal so DOM elements only render visible counts after scroll. To assert counts, scroll the entire page incrementally before querying. Key data-testids: os-hero, os-problem (12 problem cards), os-stack (15 rails), os-loop (12 steps), os-stakeholders (10), os-journeys (7), os-modules (14), os-growth (10 flow steps + 'earn extra 100,000' scenario), os-dexa (5 roles), os-scenarios (5 scenarios - selector .border\[\#11111F\]/10 matches 10 due to inner question card sharing class; use direct children or h3 count), os-architecture (10 layers), os-deployment (11), os-use-cases (16), os-outcomes (16), os-final-build-cta + os-final-talk-cta.
verified_checks: Hero Command Center has 10 metric cards
Growth OS: 10-step flow + 'earn extra 100,000' scenario present
Final CTA both buttons present with correct text
